_comment: Scorched Glass Plains (焦玻璃平原) — lightning-blasted obsidian flats where Wang Lin cultivated his Ji Realm (a thunder-based killing technique). Canon: a sub-region of the Ancient Thunder Realm (古雷界). The ground here is glassy obsidian — every bolt of lightning that has struck over eons has fused the surface into a glass-like sheen. Sparse, arid, hostile. Wither skeletons roam here as thunder-corrupted remnants of cultivators who failed to withstand the thunder-aspect Qi. Wang Lin came here specifically to refine his Ji Realm because the constant lightning strikes provide an infinite source of thunder essence to absorb. Prime Directive: the scorched glass is an objective physical residue of centuries of lightning strikes — it exists whether or not anyone is here to perceive it.
